_tier: standard (<=200K context, Global endpoint, text/image/video input)
_note: Output token pricing differs and is tracked separately by the cost-aware planner. This file tracks input-token cost only (the router's primary signal). Re-fetch monthly per <no_unverified_apis>. Long-context tier (>200K tokens) lives in a separate map.
